day4_night_start.name: Me
day4_night_start.text: *I came back to the room. Locked the door and fastened the chain.*

day4_night_start_2.name: Me
day4_night_start_2.text: *Even after fastening the chain, I don't feel safe. I put a chair in front of the door. Still don't feel safe.*

day4_night_start_3.name: Me
day4_night_start_3.text: *...This room was provided by 'them' too. What good is a lock.*

day4_night_phone_2.name: Me
day4_night_phone_2.text: *Sea: '{name}, I was worried because you suddenly disappeared today'*

day4_night_phone_9.name: Me
day4_night_phone_9.text: *5 seconds later. Sea: '...Don't sleep. Just a little longer.'*

day4_night_phone_11.name: Me
day4_night_phone_11.text: *...I didn't read them. I couldn't read them.*

day4_night_phone_eunsu.name: Me
day4_night_phone_eunsu.text: *Teacher Eunsu: 'Can you come a little early tomorrow? There's something I need to talk to you about.'*

day4_night_phone_eunsu_3.name: Me
day4_night_phone_eunsu_3.text: *'Good night.' The person who designed everything that happened at this school today -- says 'good night.'*

day4_night_phone_end.name: Me
day4_night_phone_end.text: *I put my phone in the drawer. The vibration kept going. I wrapped it in a towel to muffle the sound.*

day4_night_save_glitch.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch.text: *...The phone screen suddenly turned on. By itself. Light leaks from inside the drawer.*

day4_night_save_glitch_2.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_2.text: *I wrapped it in a towel -- but the light passes through the towel. It's not physical light.*

day4_night_save_glitch_3.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_3.text: *I took it out. A game app is open. ...A safety app? No, this is a different screen.*

day4_night_save_glitch_4.text: [Meta direction: The actual game's save/load screen opens by force. Without the player's input.]

day4_night_save_glitch_5.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_5.text: *I can see a list of save slots. From 1 to 13. ...12 slots I never saved are filled.*

day4_night_save_glitch_6.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_6.text: *Slot 1. Kim Dojin. Day 5 23:00 -- Processing Complete. The first. The very first me. Spent 5 days without knowing anything -- 'processed.'*

day4_night_save_glitch_7.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_7.text: *Slot 2. Lee Junseo. Processing Complete. Slot 4. Processing Complete. Slot 5. Processing Complete. Slot 6. Processing Complete.*

day4_night_save_glitch_8.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_8.text: ***Every time 'Processing Complete' repeats -- another person who was me dies.***

day4_night_save_glitch_9.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_9.text: *12 names. 12 instances of 'Processing Complete.' All of them... were me.*

day4_night_save_glitch_10.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_10.text: *Slot 7. Kim Taeho. 'Side effects, external contact, escape attempt.' ...The seventh. External contact? With whom? -- Seolhwa. Lee Seolhwa.*

day4_night_save_glitch_11.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_11.text: *Only Slot 7 has a different end time. 22:47. Every other 'Processing Complete' is exactly 23:00. The seventh was 13 minutes early -- something was different.*

day4_night_save_glitch_12.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_12.text: *Slot 3. Park Seojin. 'Day 4 escape attempt, failed.' ...I tried to escape before. And was caught. The third me also saw the basement. The third me also felt the terror. The third me also -- failed.*

day4_night_save_glitch_13.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_13.text: *Slot 9. Han Jiho. 'Day 3 early detection.' Detected on Day 3. The 'me' who caught on fastest. And the 'me' who was processed fastest.*

day4_night_save_glitch_14.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_14.text: *Slot 13. In progress. -- My name is written there. Not yet 'Processing Complete.' Not yet.*

day4_night_save_glitch_15.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_15.text: *I tried touching the screen. I pressed Slot 1. 'Load this save?' Yes. -- 'Access denied.'*

day4_night_save_glitch_16.name: Me
day4_night_save_glitch_16.text: *Slot 7. 'Load this save?' Yes. -- 'This data is corrupted.'*

day4_night_mirror.name: Me
day4_night_mirror.text: *...I can't breathe. I went to the bathroom. Turned on the faucet. Washed my face.*

day4_night_mirror_2.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_2.text: *Cold water hits my face. My senses don't come back. One more time. One more time.*

day4_night_mirror_4.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_4.text: *I never wiped it until now. I didn't want to wipe it. For some reason.*

day4_night_mirror_5.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_5.text: *For some reason -- now I know. My subconscious knew. What I'd see in the mirror.*

day4_night_mirror_6.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_6.text: *...This time, I have to wipe it.*

day4_night_mirror_7.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_7.text: *I raised my hand. Stopped just before touching the mirror surface. Deep breath. One. Two.*

day4_night_mirror_8.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_8.text: ***A presence behind me. I turned around. Seolhwa is standing there. In front of the bathroom door. Pale skin, silver-white hair, slender frame.***

day4_night_mirror_9.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_9.text: ***The girl is watching me. With sad eyes.***

day4_night_mirror_swipe.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_swipe.text: *I raised my hand. Placed my palm on the mirror. It's cold.*

day4_night_mirror_swipe_2.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_swipe_2.text: *I wiped slowly. Top to bottom. Once.*

day4_night_mirror_swipe_3.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_swipe_3.text: *The fog clears. My forehead is revealed.*

day4_night_mirror_swipe_5.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_swipe_5.text: *Third time. Nose. Mouth. Chin. My face is revealed.*

day4_night_mirror_hit1.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit1.text: ***In the mirror -- the space behind me is reflected.***

day4_night_mirror_hit1_3.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit1_3.text: ***Seolhwa, who was standing there just a moment ago -- is not reflected in the mirror.***

day4_night_mirror_hit1_5.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit1_5.text: *I turned around. Seolhwa is standing there. Clearly. Her silver-white hair gleams under the fluorescent light. Her eyes are wet.*

day4_night_mirror_hit1_6.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit1_6.text: *I looked at the mirror again. In the mirror -- only me. Me and an empty bathroom.*

day4_night_mirror_hit1_7.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit1_7.text: *I looked behind me. Seolhwa is there. Looked in the mirror. She's not. Behind. There. Mirror. Not there.*

day4_night_mirror_hit1_8.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit1_8.text: ***...Seolhwa is not reflected in the mirror.***

day4_night_mirror_hit1_10.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit1_10.text: *Eunsu's observation journal from the basement comes to mind.*

day4_night_mirror_hit1_11.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit1_11.text: *'Defense mechanism of relying on a nonexistent other... confirmed as hallucination.'*

day4_night_mirror_hit1_12.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit1_12.text: ***The girl standing behind me, watching over me right now -- died a year ago.***

day4_night_mirror_hit1_13.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit1_13.text: ***The person I've been talking to, relying on, receiving warnings from -- was a hallucination created inside my head.***

day4_night_mirror_hit1_15.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit1_15.text: *I hear a voice. Clearly. My eardrums vibrate. But this voice -- didn't come through the air. It resonates from inside my head.*

day4_night_mirror_hit2.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit2.text: *My vision narrows. I stare at the mirror. My face. I look at my face.*

day4_night_mirror_hit2_2.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit2_2.text: *For the first time in 4 days, I properly look at my own face. It's unfamiliar. Is this face me.*

day4_night_mirror_hit2_3.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit2_3.text: *This face was also Kim Dojin, also Lee Junseo, also Park Seojin. I pull out the photos I left on the sink. Save slot data from the app. Records of 13 people.*

day4_night_mirror_hit2_4.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit2_4.text: *#1. Kim Dojin. Short black hair. The face -- identical.*

day4_night_mirror_hit2_5.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit2_5.text: *#3. Park Seojin. Brown hair. The face -- identical.*

day4_night_mirror_hit2_6.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit2_6.text: *#7. Kim Taeho. Long hair. Gaunt cheeks. But the placement of eyes, nose, mouth -- identical.*

day4_night_mirror_hit2_7.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit2_7.text: ***Different hair color. Different names. But compared to my face in the mirror -- all identical.***

day4_night_mirror_hit2_9.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_hit2_9.text: ***What was yesterday's lunch. The chicken cutlet Sea packed. The coffee Teacher Eunsu made. ...I placed the hallucination of a person who died for me behind my back, and swallowed all of that while smiling with the people who killed her.***

day4_night_mirror_overlay.text: [The 13 ID photos rapidly overlay onto the face in the mirror. #1 Kim Dojin → #3 Park Seojin → #7 Kim Taeho → ... → #12 Im Seoyul → {name}. Different hair colors, different name tags flicker and overlap, but the contours of the face align perfectly.]

day4_night_mirror_collapse.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_collapse.text: *I stumbled backward. My back hit the wall. I slid down.*

day4_night_mirror_collapse_2.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_collapse_2.text: ***The reason Seolhwa said 'remember me.' It was literal. -- Don't forget the person who disappeared for my sake.***

day4_night_mirror_collapse_3.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_collapse_3.text: *I collapsed onto the floor. I hugged my knees.*

day4_night_mirror_collapse_4.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_collapse_4.text: *My teeth chatter. My body won't listen to me.*

day4_night_mirror_collapse_5.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_collapse_5.text: *Tears come. Silently. My throat tightens so no sound comes out.*

day4_night_mirror_collapse_6.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_collapse_6.text: *...Are these tears for Seolhwa. Or for myself, the thirteenth shell. Or for a self who, despite dying twelve times -- never once cried for themselves.*

day4_night_mirror_collapse_7.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_collapse_7.text: *I don't know. I just -- collapse. The bathroom floor is cold. The chill of the tiles seeps through my back. I don't know how long I stayed like that.*

day4_night_mirror_collapse_8.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_collapse_8.text: *...Seolhwa is sitting beside me. The girl who isn't reflected in the mirror. The hallucination. The dead person.*

day4_night_mirror_collapse_9.name: Me
day4_night_mirror_collapse_9.text: *But -- someone is beside me. Real or not. For now, that alone is enough.*

day4_night_plan.name: Me
day4_night_plan.text: *...I don't know how long I stayed like that. Only after my tears dried did I get up.*

day4_night_plan_2.name: Me
day4_night_plan_2.text: *I looked in the mirror again. The face after crying. Swollen eyes. Red nose. -- This is the thirteenth me.*

day4_night_plan_3.name: Me
day4_night_plan_3.text: *I opened my notebook. My hands are trembling but I write. With my left hand. Because I'm left-handed. ...The facts Seolhwa knew -- now I know them too.*

day4_night_plan_4.name: Me
day4_night_plan_4.text: *One. This school is conducting memory manipulation experiments on me. Thirteenth iteration.*

day4_night_plan_5.name: Me
day4_night_plan_5.text: *Two. Eunsu = Director. Riin = Drugs. Sea = Surveillance.*

day4_night_plan_6.name: Me
day4_night_plan_6.text: *Three. Seolhwa = A person who rebelled with me during the seventh iteration and was disposed of. The Seolhwa I see now is a hallucination created by memory.*

day4_night_plan_7.name: Me
day4_night_plan_7.text: *Four. Yuna = Missing. A sudden 'transfer.' The only person who took photos.*

day4_night_plan_8.name: Me
day4_night_plan_8.text: *Five. Tomorrow is the fifth day. 'Final processing' at 11 PM.*

day4_night_plan_9.name: Me
day4_night_plan_9.text: *Six. Old building 3rd floor emergency exit = The escape route Seolhwa found.*

day4_night_plan_10.name: Me
day4_night_plan_10.text: *...I stopped writing. Put the pen down.*

day4_night_plan_11.name: Me
day4_night_plan_11.text: *Seven. Teacher Riin has the key. She said she'd buy time until tomorrow morning.*

day4_night_plan_12.name: Me
day4_night_plan_12.text: *Eight. The third me attempted escape on Day 4 and failed. Caught at the front gate. -- The front gate is not an option.*

day4_night_plan_13.name: Me
day4_night_plan_13.text: *Nine. The seventh me tried with Seolhwa. It ended at 22:47. 13 minutes before 23:00. -- Something was different.*

day4_night_plan_14.name: Me
day4_night_plan_14.text: *Ten. The ninth me was detected on Day 3. Can't move too fast.*

day4_night_plan_15.name: Me
day4_night_plan_15.text: *My hands tremble. The letters come out crooked. But I didn't stop.*

day4_night_plan_choice.name: Me
choices: Expose the evidence to the outside

day4_night_plan_escape.name: Me
day4_night_plan_escape.text: *Escape. The front gate is the path #3 failed on. I'll take the old building emergency exit.*

day4_night_plan_expose.name: Me
day4_night_plan_expose.text: *Get the evidence out first. With records of all 13 iterations, they can't be ignored.*

day4_night_plan_confront.name: Me
day4_night_plan_confront.text: *Head-on. I'll tell Eunsu directly. That I know about all 13 times.*

day4_night_plan_final.name: Me
day4_night_plan_final.text: *I packed my bag. Evidence. Phone. Yuna's camera. The bare minimum.*

day4_night_plan_final_2.name: Me
day4_night_plan_final_2.text: *I wrote on the last line of the notebook.*

day4_night_plan_final_3.name: Me
day4_night_plan_final_3.text: ***'All 12 of me failed. The thirteenth -- will do it differently.'***
